## What & why

<!-- one paragraph; link the issue / ADR / OQ this implements -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Failing test written first (TDD, D-010); `task check` green (incl. ≥90% coverage gate)
- [ ] Contract-affecting change? → openspec proposal linked, `apiVersion` handled
- [ ] Decision-affecting change? → golden fixtures updated via reviewed `--update` diff
- [ ] Docs updated (ADR/GUIDELINES/examples as applicable); no employer/internal references
- [ ] Commits follow `:gitmoji: type(scope): summary`, one logical change each
